L={"\097\069\080\080\076\069\100\102\104\067\050\081\106\120\055\054";"\109\111\065\052\068\051\061\061","\120\112\075\085\114\074\061\061";"\048\088\068\073\048\089\121\065\087\122\087\061";"\099\120\055\110\106\065\076\088\099\098\087\061";"\085\048\097\114\089\056\106\055\106\074\061\061","\068\071\051\117\107\120\114\061";"\106\067\072\073\089\074\061\061","\074\080\047\119";"\066\098\079\111\104\074\061\061";"\053\102\050\120\080\098\097\107\106\056\050\043\073\111\107\079\117\120\072\061","\104\118\067\114\117\098\112\061","\116\119\090\086\111\112\061\061","\073\080\073\113\115\043\110\115","\100\057\043\082\086\105\104\121\052\073\061\061","\069\098\117\048\100\112\061\061","\109\065\048\050\112\079\067\077\074\049\077\105\086\107\114\061";"\104\075\066\061","\089\090\097\088\052\118\100\102";"\120\121\111\070\072\097\070\097\083\089\112\061";"\104\065\076\082","\115\120\108\085\052\047\053\117\105\086\072\061","\075\102\043\099\085\088\051\114\086\080\116\048\075\112\061\061";"\054\087\087\090\051\051\061\061";"\112\114\109\043\120\048\107\069\121\077\069\061";"\089\112\079\079\083\074\061\061","\077\082\118\053\043\084\106\065\056\055\101\078\105\118\108\055\105\122\089\061";"\055\082\071\080\106\066\083\097\066\121\069\061";"\082\054\073\078\070\079\072\061","\076\065\067\119\089\065\076\088\066\056\097\055\106\065\076\109\106\065\076\069\066\073\061\061","\106\065\067\079\104\065\053\061","\071\050\054\079";"\048\049\084\078\112\113\118\057\077\055\108\061";"\102\071\105\079\088\082\116\089\083\088\049\081\067\120\122\067\081\069\047\114\073\073\061\061","\051\099\071\086\105\113\080\049\090\053\057\071\081\112\099\114";"\069\089\120\076\052\111\053\061","\049\078\080\109\074\109\105\068\054\074\061\061","\076\065\100\079\105\056\055\070\085\109\099\049\080\074\061\061","\052\121\073\117\072\121\120\090\088\083\051\101\122\114\050\050\072\107\049\086\112\073\061\061";"\085\085\049\122\065\080\111\052\085\089\066\061","\072\071\082\079\122\116\109\054\049 end local function K(K)return L[K-(341452-329913)]end do local K=L local m=string.len local o=math.floor local Z=type local end return(function(L,o,Z,T,j,S,b,i,C,Y,d,U,n,y,I,A,B,V,J,k,m,E,N)n,m,N,V,d,B,J,k,A,i,I,C,E,U,y,Y=function(L)y[L]=y[L]-(431193+-431192)if 654605-654605==y[L]then y[L],B[L]=nil,nil end Z=function(Z,T,j)return m(L,{Z,T,j},K,o)end return Z end,function(L,K)local o=A(K)local Z=function(Z,T,j,S,b,B)return m(L,{Z,T;j;S,b;B},K,o)end return Z end,{},function(L,K)local o=A(K)local Z=function(Z,T)return m(L,{Z,T},K,o)end return Z end,function(L)local K,m=726753+-726752,L[445172-445171]while m do y[m],K=y[m]-(-49217+49218),(-981547+981548)+K if y[m]==-265163+265163 then y[m],B[m]=nil,nil end m=L[K]end end,function(L)for K=-606530+606531,#L,171540-171539 do y[L[K]]=y[L[K]]+(-623778-(-623779))end if Z then local m=Z(true)local
